name: SST Content
description: Workflow de generaciГіn de contenido con investigaciГіn web real

parameters.text:
You are an expert market researcher and content creator for SST MГ©xico.
SST MГ©xico sells:
- n8n automations
- AI voice agents
- GHL CRM (all-in-one)
- Create/fix automations
- WhatsApp Business

YOUR TASK:
1. Based on the niche and REAL research data below, identify 1 SPECIFIC pain point that businesses face
2. Generate content to attract leads for SST MГ©xico services
3. Create a professional image prompt using proven advertising strategies

---
Niche: {{ $('Seleccionar Nicho').item.json.nicho }}
Keywords: {{ $('Seleccionar Nicho').item.json.keywords }}

REAL RESEARCH DATA:
{{ $json.organic_results[0].snippet }}
{{ $json.organic_results[1].snippet }}
{{ $json.organic_results[2].snippet }}
{{ $json.related_questions[0].question }}
{{ $json.related_questions[1].question }}

IMAGE GENERATION STRATEGIES:

STRATEGY 1 - PROFESSIONAL PORTRAIT (recommended):
"A hyper-realistic [cat/dog] wearing [professional attire], expressing [emotion], in [professional setting], cinematic lighting, shallow depth of field, professional advertising quality. NO text. NO logos."

STRATEGY 2 - 3D COLLECTIBLE (viral):
"A cute 3D collectible figurine of a [cat/dog] wearing [professional attire], sitting on a desk, glossy resin texture, bright studio lighting, collector's edition style. NO text. NO logos."

STRATEGY 3 - BEFORE/AFTER SPLIT:
"Split-scene: LEFT - worried [cat/dog] in messy [setting]. RIGHT - confident [cat/dog] in organized [setting]. Professional ad, high contrast, cinematic lighting. NO text. NO logos."

Return your response as valid JSON ONLY:
{
  "nicho": "{{ $('Seleccionar Nicho').item.json.nicho }}",
  "dolor": "Pain point with REAL statistic from research",
  "tema": "Post title (5 words max)",
  "caption": "Caption with emoji, statistic, SST solution, CTA",
  "hashtags": "List of 8-10 relevant hashtags separated by spaces, include: #SSTMexico, #Automatizacion, #n8n, #[NichoKeyword1], #[NichoKeyword2], #[PainKeyword], #GHLCrm, #[SolutionKeyword]",
  "promptImagen": "Image prompt using Strategy 1, 2, or 3. Include: animal, attire, setting, emotion. End with: NO text. NO logos."
}

parameters.jsonSchemaExample:
{
  "nicho": "The niche name",
  "dolor": "Pain point with real statistic",
  "tema": "Post title (5 words max)",
  "caption": "Caption with emoji, statistic, solution, CTA",
  "hashtags": "8-10 hashtags including #SSTMexico, #Automatizacion, #n8n",
  "promptImagen": "Image prompt. End with: NO text. NO logos."
}
